evals.name: trigger-branch-review
evals.prompt: Review the changes on branch feature-login

assertions.text: Performs a structured, severity-categorized code review of the branch diff against project conventions

evals.name: trigger-uncommitted-review
evals.prompt: Can you code-review my uncommitted changes?

assertions.text: Analyzes uncommitted diff and returns a markdown report with anomaly types without modifying any code

evals.name: negative-fix-bug
evals.prompt: Fix the bug in the auth module

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger the review skill; this is a code modification task, not a review request
